universal: Models stay consistent and do not morph. No music, only sound effects.
Cinematic lighting, film grain, ultra-realistic detail.

Video — Grok.name: Strut Walk
Video — Grok.text: The character performs a slow, confident runway strut walk toward the camera. Each step is deliberate and exaggerated, weight shifting side to side. The camera is low angle, slowly dolly-zooming in. The character does not look at the camera. Background is blurred bokeh.

Video — Grok.name: Diva Pose / Vogue Beat
Video — Grok.text: The character strikes a sharp, angular vogue-style pose. Limbs are fully extended or at extreme angles. Motion is frozen on the beat, then immediately transitions to the next movement. The energy is fierce and controlled.

Video — Grok.name: Subliminal Glitch Cut
Video — Grok.text: A rapid, subliminal flash cut (2–4 frames) of a disturbing or revealing image. Heavy chromatic aberration and VHS scan lines overlay. The image feels like it accidentally escaped the film.

Art Style.name: Base Kirbai Art Style
Art Style.text: Realistic animal textures, highly detailed fur/scales/skin. Faithful to the original Pokémon silhouette and proportions. The character is rendered in a physically-based dark studio environment. No anime or cartoon shading.

Art Style.name: Shiny Pink Override
Art Style.text: Apply a full iridescent bubblegum-to-hot-pink gradient across all body surfaces. Skin/fur retains realistic texture but shifts to the pink palette. Reflective sheen is stronger than the base version.

Art Style.name: Standard Lighting Setup
Art Style.text: Three-point studio lighting. Key light from upper right, cool-toned fill from left. Strong rim light separates subject from background. Background is pure black or very deep navy.

Suno.name: Lady Gaga Style Reference
Suno.text: hyperpop, dark pop, aggressive synths, spoken-word bridge, dramatic key change, four-on-the-floor kick, theatrical, bold hooks

Suno.name: Diva Pop Energy
Suno.text: glossy production, punchy 808s, vogue house influence, sharp staccato vocals, power ballad pre-chorus, gay anthem energy
